description: custom prop set on :hover/::before doesn't affect documentElement
xfail_v1: calcite parses all qualified-rule blocks as flat declaration lists regardless of selector — :hover and ::before declarations are aggregated alongside :root, so the later :hover write to --r wins. Computational CSS only authors to :root/.cpu so this isn't a hot-path bug, but the divergence is real. Phase 1+ should track selector specificity at lowering time.
